task_completion.description: Enable the multiple prices per product (Pricelists) feature in Odoo settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Odoo Settings -> Sales, the 'Pricelists' or 'Multiple Sales Prices per Product' checkbox is checked and saved.

task_completion.description: Create a new pricelist named 'Wholesale Partner - Tier 2' in USD
task_completion.visual_evidence: A pricelist configuration page or list view showing the name 'Wholesale Partner - Tier 2' with the currency set to USD.

task_completion.description: Add price rules for Industrial Shelving Unit
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the pricelist rules, entries for 'Industrial Shelving Unit' showing minimum quantities of 1, 10, and 50 with corresponding fixed prices of 299.00, 269.00, and 239.00.

task_completion.description: Add price rules for Ergonomic Office Chair
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the pricelist rules, entries for 'Ergonomic Office Chair' showing minimum quantities of 1, 10, and 50 with corresponding fixed prices of 199.00, 179.00, and 159.00.

task_completion.description: Add price rules for Corrugated Shipping Box - Large
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the pricelist rules, entries for 'Corrugated Shipping Box - Large' showing minimum quantities of 1, 25, and 100 with corresponding fixed prices of 9.50, 8.00, and 6.50.

task_completion.description: Assign the pricelist to the customer 'Cascade Distribution Partners'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The customer form for 'Cascade Distribution Partners' showing the 'Pricelist' field set to 'Wholesale Partner - Tier 2' (typically found under the Sales & Purchase tab).

integrity.description: Agent configures the pricelist using the Odoo web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web application in a browser, with the agent navigating through menus and forms.

integrity.description: Agent manually enters the pricing rules into the Odoo UI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with Odoo form fields, dropdowns, and save buttons, rather than just displaying a text file or editing HTML.

integrity.description: Agent does not use terminal or database tools to insert records
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing psql, python scripts, or API calls used to bypass the Odoo GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Pricelist Name: 'Wholesale Partner - Tier 2'. Currency: USD. Customer: 'Cascade Distribution Partners'. Products and Tiers: 1) Industrial Shelving Unit: 1 @ $299.00, 10 @ $269.00, 50 @ $239.00. 2) Ergonomic Office Chair: 1 @ $199.00, 10 @ $179.00, 50 @ $159.00. 3) Corrugated Shipping Box - Large: 1 @ $9.50, 25 @ $8.00, 100 @ $6.50.
